name: Bay Door
description: A wide sliding door leading out to the corridor. It stands open, its mechanism apparently triggered when your pod activated.

name: Bay C-7 Entrance
description: The entrance to Hibernation Bay C-7. Cold vapor drifts out from within.

name: Corridor West
description: The corridor continues west, following the green guide strip toward a wider junction area.

name: Medical Station Door
description: A door marked with a red cross and the words MEDICAL STATION C. It slides open as you approach.

name: Exit to Corridor
description: The door back to Corridor C.

name: Corridor East
description: The corridor stretches east toward the hibernation bays.

name: Hydroponics Entrance
description: An archway threaded with stray vines. Warm, humid air and the smell of growing things wafts through. A sign reads HYDROPONICS GALLERY but someone has painted over it with the word GARDEN in green.

name: Exit to Junction
description: The archway back to Junction C. The air is noticeably cooler and drier beyond it.

name: Engineering Hatch
description: A heavy hatch in the floor with yellow-and-black hazard striping. A keypad glows beside it. The word ENGINEERING is stenciled on the rim.

exit.destinationIntent: Engineering Access C — a maintenance corridor leading down to the ship's mechanical systems. Should feel industrial, utilitarian, possibly restricted. Warning signs, heavy doors, the hum of machinery. May require access clearance.

name: Commons Passage
description: A wide passage leading toward the bow. The guide strips here split into multiple colors. A sign reads THE COMMONS but the lights beyond are dark.

exit.destinationIntent: The Commons — a large communal living area where the ship's inhabitants spent their waking lives. Should feel like a town square or village center, but enclosed within the ship. Evidence of different factions having claimed and decorated different parts. Currently dark and dormant, furniture covered in dust cloths, but the space itself is grand. May have multiple sub-areas.

name: Overgrown Path
description: The vegetation thickens to the north, where the grow-troughs have been completely overtaken. A narrow path winds between the trunks of plants that have no business being this large.

exit.destinationIntent: Deeper into the overgrown hydroponics section. The plants get denser, wilder, less recognizable. There may be a water reservoir or a section where the grow-lights have failed, creating a dark jungle area. Could contain something unexpected growing in the deep overgrowth.
